name: Six Flags New Orleans
description: Six Flags New Orleans was a theme park located near the intersection of Interstate 10 and Interstate 510 in New Orleans.  It first opened as Jazzland in 2000, and a 75-year lease agreement was established with Six Flags in 2002 following the previous operator's bankruptcy proceedings.  Six Flags invested $20 million in upgrades, and the park reopened as Six Flags New Orleans in 2003.
imageAttribution: Six Flags New Orleans' entrance in June 2004
